Design System v0.29.0
Overview Foundations

Layout

  • App-Shell Layout-Primitive
  • Card Component
  • Divider Component
  • List-Row Component
  • Panel-List Component
  • Section Component

Form

  • Button Component
  • Checkbox + Radio Components
  • Combobox Component
  • Date-Input Component
  • Field Component
  • File-Upload Component
  • OTP Input — One-Time Password / Multi-Field-Code
  • Range-Slider Component
  • Search-Input Component
  • Segmented Control
  • Select Component
  • Slider Component
  • Switch Component

Feedback

  • Alert Component
  • Banner Component
  • Callout Component
  • Empty-State Component
  • Progress Component
  • Skeleton Loader
  • Spinner Component
  • Toast / Notification Component

Navigation

  • Accordion Component
  • Back-to-Top Button
  • Breadcrumbs Component
  • Nav Component
  • Pagination Component
  • Scroll-Spy Navigation
  • Steps Component
  • Tabs Component
  • Tree Component

Overlay

  • Command Palette
  • Drawer Component
  • Hover-Card — Rich Preview on Hover
  • Modal Component
  • Popover Component
  • Tooltip Component

Data Display

  • Avatar Component
  • Avatar-Stack Component
  • Badge Component
  • Chart Container
  • CodeBlock Component
  • Funnel Component
  • Stat Component
  • Table Component
  • Tag Component
  • Timeline Component
  • Trend Component

Primitive

  • Chevron Component
  • Copy Button — Copy-to-Clipboard
  • KBD — Keyboard Shortcut Display
  • Theme Toggle — Light/Dark Mode Switch
Themes Recipes
Layout
  • App-Shell Layout-Primitive
  • Card Component
  • Divider Component
  • List-Row Component
  • Panel-List Component
  • Section Component
Form
  • Button Component
  • Checkbox + Radio Components
  • Combobox Component
  • Date-Input Component
  • Field Component
  • File-Upload Component
  • OTP Input — One-Time Password / Multi-Field-Code
  • Range-Slider Component
  • Search-Input Component
  • Segmented Control
  • Select Component
  • Slider Component
  • Switch Component
Feedback
  • Alert Component
  • Banner Component
  • Callout Component
  • Empty-State Component
  • Progress Component
  • Skeleton Loader
  • Spinner Component
  • Toast / Notification Component

  • Scroll-Spy Navigation
  • Steps Component
  • Tabs Component
  • Tree Component
Overlay
  • Command Palette
  • Drawer Component
  • Hover-Card — Rich Preview on Hover
  • Modal Component
  • Popover Component
  • Tooltip Component
Data Display
  • Avatar Component
  • Avatar-Stack Component
  • Badge Component
  • Chart Container
  • CodeBlock Component
  • Funnel Component
  • Stat Component
  • Table Component
  • Tag Component
  • Timeline Component
  • Trend Component
Primitive
  • Chevron Component
  • Copy Button — Copy-to-Clipboard
  • KBD — Keyboard Shortcut Display
  • Theme Toggle — Light/Dark Mode Switch
Overlay

Command Palette

Floating-Dialog mit Search + Filtered-List für Power-User-Navigation. Standard-Pattern in modernen Apps (GitHub, VSCode, Linear, etc.).

Nutzt native <dialog> (A11Y, modal-blocking, Escape-close, ::backdrop) — gleiche Architektur wie Modal. Listbox via WAI-ARIA-Combobox-Pattern.

Beispiele

Esc
  • Aktionen
  • + Neue Buchung ⌘N
  • ⌕ Kunde suchen
↑↓ navigieren ↵ auswählen

Tone-Übersicht

Dieselbe Komponente unter allen 6 Tones. Klick auf eine Kachel um die ganze Seite auf diesen Tone zu schalten.

trust
Esc
  • Aktionen
  • + Neue Buchung ⌘N
  • ⌕ Kunde suchen
↑↓ navigieren ↵ auswählen
playful
Esc
  • Aktionen
  • + Neue Buchung ⌘N
  • ⌕ Kunde suchen
↑↓ navigieren ↵ auswählen
premium
Esc
  • Aktionen
  • + Neue Buchung ⌘N
  • ⌕ Kunde suchen
↑↓ navigieren ↵ auswählen
industrial
Esc
  • Aktionen
  • + Neue Buchung ⌘N
  • ⌕ Kunde suchen
↑↓ navigieren ↵ auswählen
modern
Esc
  • Aktionen
  • + Neue Buchung ⌘N
  • ⌕ Kunde suchen
↑↓ navigieren ↵ auswählen
minimal
Esc
  • Aktionen
  • + Neue Buchung ⌘N
  • ⌕ Kunde suchen
↑↓ navigieren ↵ auswählen

Token-Contract

TokenStatusNotiz
--cmd-bg Optional —
--cmd-fg Optional —
--cmd-radius Optional —
--cmd-shadow Optional —
--cmd-search-bg Optional —
--cmd-list-bg Optional —
--cmd-item-hover-bg Optional —
--cmd-item-active-bg Optional —
--cmd-max-w Optional —
--cmd-max-h Optional —
Source-CSS ansehen
